_comment: Cloudflare DNS Configuration - Wedding Digital SaaS Platform
_description: DNS records for all production subdomains with DNSSEC enabled

dns_records.comment: Invitation App wildcard - handles {event-slug}.{domain} dynamic routing

dns_records.name: api
dns_records.comment: Fastify API server hosted on Railway

dnssec.note: DS record must be added at domain registrar after enabling

ttl_strategy.note: Start with 300s TTL for quick DNS changes during go-live. Increase to 3600s after 48h of stable operation.
